top_articles.title: CISA flags Apache ActiveMQ flaw as actively exploited in attacks
top_articles.summary: CISA warned that attackers are now exploiting a high-severity Apache ActiveMQ vulnerability, which was patched earlier this month after going undetected for 13 years.

top_articles.title: April Patch Tuesday Fixes Critical Flaws Across SAP, Adobe, Microsoft, Fortinet, and More

top_articles.title: Cisco Patches Critical Vulnerabilities in Webex, ISE
top_articles.summary: The flaws can be exploited remotely to impersonate users or execute arbitrary commands on the underlying OS.

top_articles.title: Exploited Vulnerability Exposes Nginx Servers to Hacking
top_articles.summary: Hackers are exploiting CVE-2026-33032, a critical remote takeover vulnerability in the Nginx UI management tool.

top_articles.title: Critical Nginx UI auth bypass flaw now actively exploited in the wild
top_articles.summary: A critical vulnerability in Nginx UI with Model Context Protocol (MCP) support is now being exploited in the wild for full server takeover without authentication.
